title: System Design
subtitle: Distributed systems, CAP, and resilience
description: Senior interviews always include a system design round. Learn CAP theorem, caching strategies, message brokers, the Saga pattern, Outbox pattern, Polly resilience, and how to structure your answer under time pressure.
learningOutcomes: Apply CAP theorem to design trade-offs
Design a caching strategy with Redis
Choose between RabbitMQ, Kafka, and Azure Service Bus
Implement the Outbox pattern for reliability
Build resilience with Polly (retry, circuit breaker)
